name: revit_export_schedules_to_excel
description: Exports selected Revit schedules and standard tables to an Excel workbook for external editing or layout review.

schedule_names.description: Schedule view names to export; omit to require UI selection

include_standards.description: When true, also export selected standard tables (line styles, object styles, etc.)

export_mode.description: Bidirectional workbooks can be re-imported; layout_only preserves schedule appearance for viewing

notes: Upstream BIM One add-in; selection and save dialogs are not yet parameterized for headless MCP use.
